Save the 8 earbud photos into THIS folder (public/earbuds/) using these EXACT
filenames. After adding them, refresh the site and the product images appear.
(JPG or PNG both work, but keep the .jpg name shown below — or change the
extension in App.tsx to match your files.)

White Losse Pro 2 (Without Box)
  Image 1  ->  losse-pro2-white-nobox-1.jpg
  Image 2  ->  losse-pro2-white-nobox-2.jpg

Black Losse Pro 2 (Without Box)
  Image 3  ->  losse-pro2-black-nobox-1.jpg
  Image 4  ->  losse-pro2-black-nobox-2.jpg

Losse Pro 2 Black (With Box)
  Image 5  ->  losse-pro2-black-box-1.jpg
  Image 6  ->  losse-pro2-black-box-2.jpg

Losse Pro 2 White (With Box)
  Image 7  ->  losse-pro2-white-box-1.jpg
  Image 8  ->  losse-pro2-white-box-2.jpg
